footnotes.F1: On August 6, 2021, pursuant to the Agreement and Plan of Merger ("Merger Agreement"), dated as of April 16, 2021 by and between Bank of Marin Bancorp ("BMRC") and American River Bankshares ("AMRB"), AMRB merged with and into BMRC ("Merger"), and each outstanding AMRB common share was converted into the right to receive 0.575 of a share of BMRC common stock, with cash payable in lieu of a fractional share in an amount equal to the fraction of a share of BMRC common stock which the holder would otherwise be entitled to receive multiplied by $33.59. In connection with the Merger, the reporting person has the right to receive, in exchange for all of the AMRB common shares reported in Table I, an aggregate of 8,134 shares of BMRC common stock and $17.80 in cash, with cash payable in lieu of a fractional share of BMRC common stock, subject to any required tax withholding under applicable law. [Contd. in FN2]
